# Clean draft (test fixture — should produce zero findings)

In this working paper (not yet peer-reviewed), X was associated with
Y in fixed-effects models. Estimates should not be interpreted as
causal effects.

这项工作论文（尚未经过同行评审）发现 X 与 Y 相关。该结果不应被
解读为因果效应。

The tool is an early-stage prototype; interfaces may change. It
resolves file paths relative to the project root.
